nodes.name: Golden-winged manakin
nodes.summary: Golden-winged manakin（Golden-winged manakin，学名 Masius chrysopterus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于云雾森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: III | title =Birds of Peru | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =revised and updated |series=Princeton Field Guides | date =2010 | location =Princeton, NJ | pages =498 |isbn = 978-0691130231 }} The golden-winged manakin inhabits wet montane cloudforest, though it will forage in clearings and forest edges. In elevation it ranges between in Venezuela, in Colombia, mostly in Ecuador but locally lower in the west, and in Peru
